name: Skjern Bank A/S
summary: Skjern Bank A/S provides various banking products and services to private, corporate, and institutional customers in Denmark. The company offers saving accounts; financing products; loans; pension funds; personal and travel insurances; real estate consulting, leasing, and investment services; and related advisory services, as well as credit cards. It serves the agriculture, industry, retail, transport, and real estate sectors, as well as private clients. The company operates branches in Skjern, Varde, Esbjerg, Bramming, Ribe, Hellerup, and Virum. Skjern Bank A/S was founded in 1906 and is based in Skjern, Denmark.
